# Sidebar

Provides a collapsible, keyboard-toggled application sidebar.

## Install

```bash
pnpm dlx @stalk-ui/cli add @stalk-ui/sidebar
```

## Examples

<ComponentPreview
  slug="sidebar"
  example={0}
  code={`<div style={{ border: "1px solid var(--colors-border-default)", borderRadius: 8, display: "flex", height: 280, overflow: "hidden" }}>
  <Sidebar.Provider style={{ minHeight: "100%" }}>
    <Sidebar>
      <Sidebar.Header>
        <Sidebar.Trigger />
        <span style={{ fontWeight: 600 }}>Acme</span>
      </Sidebar.Header>
      <Sidebar.Content>
        <Sidebar.Group>
          <Sidebar.GroupLabel>Workspace</Sidebar.GroupLabel>
          <Sidebar.Menu>
            <Sidebar.MenuItem>
              <Sidebar.MenuButton isActive><Home /><span>Queue</span></Sidebar.MenuButton>
            </Sidebar.MenuItem>
            <Sidebar.MenuItem>
              <Sidebar.MenuButton><Settings /><span>Settings</span></Sidebar.MenuButton>
            </Sidebar.MenuItem>
          </Sidebar.Menu>
        </Sidebar.Group>
      </Sidebar.Content>
      <Sidebar.Rail />
    </Sidebar>
    <Sidebar.Inset>
      <div style={{ alignItems: "center", display: "flex", gap: 8, padding: 12 }}>
        <Sidebar.Trigger />
        <strong>Task Queue</strong>
      </div>
    </Sidebar.Inset>
  </Sidebar.Provider>
</div>`}
/>

```tsx
<div
  style={{
    border: '1px solid var(--colors-border-default)',
    borderRadius: 8,
    display: 'flex',
    height: 280,
    overflow: 'hidden',
  }}
>
  <Sidebar.Provider style={{ minHeight: '100%' }}>
    <Sidebar>
      <Sidebar.Header>
        <Sidebar.Trigger />
        <span style={{ fontWeight: 600 }}>Acme</span>
      </Sidebar.Header>
      <Sidebar.Content>
        <Sidebar.Group>
          <Sidebar.GroupLabel>Workspace</Sidebar.GroupLabel>
          <Sidebar.Menu>
            <Sidebar.MenuItem>
              <Sidebar.MenuButton isActive>
                <Home />
                <span>Queue</span>
              </Sidebar.MenuButton>
            </Sidebar.MenuItem>
            <Sidebar.MenuItem>
              <Sidebar.MenuButton>
                <Settings />
                <span>Settings</span>
              </Sidebar.MenuButton>
            </Sidebar.MenuItem>
          </Sidebar.Menu>
        </Sidebar.Group>
      </Sidebar.Content>
      <Sidebar.Rail />
    </Sidebar>
    <Sidebar.Inset>
      <div style={{ alignItems: 'center', display: 'flex', gap: 8, padding: 12 }}>
        <Sidebar.Trigger />
        <strong>Task Queue</strong>
      </div>
    </Sidebar.Inset>
  </Sidebar.Provider>
</div>
```

## Props

### `<Sidebar.MenuButton>`

| Prop       | Type      | Required | Default | Description                                                                     |
| ---------- | --------- | -------- | ------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| `asChild`  | `boolean` | No       | -       | Render the single child element (e.g. a router link) instead of a \`<button>\`. |
| `isActive` | `boolean` | No       | -       | Marks the button as the current item.                                           |

### `<Sidebar.Provider>`

| Prop           | Type                      | Required | Default | Description |
| -------------- | ------------------------- | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `defaultOpen`  | `boolean`                 | No       | -       | -           |
| `open`         | `boolean`                 | No       | -       | -           |
| `onOpenChange` | `(open: boolean) => void` | No       | -       | -           |

### `<Sidebar.Root>`

| Prop       | Type        | Required | Default | Description |
| ---------- | ----------- | -------- | ------- | ----------- |
| `children` | `ReactNode` | No       | -       | -           |
